title: Solving Multiclass Learning Problems via Error-Correcting Output Codes
search_query: Solving Multiclass Learning Problems via Error-Correcting Output Codes
notes: Multiclass learning problems involve finding a definitionfor an unknown function f(x) whose range is a discrete setcontaining k > 2 values (i.e., k ``classes''). Thedefinition is acquired by studying collections of training examples ofthe form [x_i, f (x_i)]. Existing approach...
